'''Billey''' was a prominent [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. His origin was unknown, but he was widely assumed to be [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]].

==Biography==
He ran a relatively large organization and was famous in smuggling circles for having survived as an active [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] for over 60 [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. Shortly before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Billey aided a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] task force in stopping organized smuggling of [[Salt/Legends|salt]] to [[Cona/Legends|Cona]], leading to the [[Arcona/Legends|Arconans]] to name him an "honorary legend." At one point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Billey was caught smuggling [[Spice/Legends|spice]] and served time in the [[Goshyn Detention Center]]. Billey was severely injured but refused cybernetic replacements, forcing him to use a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorchair]]. As of the [[Bacta War]], Billey largely controlled the black market supply of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], but his lieutenants [[Dravis]], [[Ellor]], [[Par'tah]], and [[Brasck]] handled the day-to-day operation of his organization, and most of the negotiations with his clients. Later, Billey's organization was part of [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Smugglers' Alliance]].
